title: “I spent $50,000 self-hosting AI models. You should too.” - 0xSero
summary: 0xSero advocates for self-hosting AI models as worthwhile investment, having spent $50,000 on infrastructure. The podcast discusses local AI deployment, specific models like GLM 5.2 and Fable 5, and economics of running private AI systems.
writeup: 0xSero makes the case for self-hosting AI models locally rather than relying on cloud services, drawing on a personal example of spending $50,000 on local infrastructure. The video covers the economics of running AI systems on owned hardware and references specific models including GLM 5.2 and Fable 5. The central claim is that the upfront investment in local AI deployment can justify itself relative to ongoing cloud costs.
